description: AI-powered economic data aggregation, trend analysis, and research report generation for financial intelligence

agents.name: Data Aggregator
agents.description: Collects and normalizes economic indicators from global data sources including central banks, statistical bureaus, and market data providers

agents.name: Trend Analyst
agents.description: Performs statistical trend analysis, identifies correlations between economic indicators, and detects anomalies in macroeconomic data

agents.name: Research Writer
agents.description: Generates research-grade economic reports with forecasts, policy impact assessments, and actionable investment recommendations
